feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Maintenance Plan with Completion Indicator CHECKED generates WOs even without previous WOs completed
entry.content:
Hi All.

Has anyone faced a similar issue? We have 31 exactly same maintenance plans. They are scheduled and have already generated some calls. All of a sudden, plan number 27 and 28 have started work orders without the previous orders being completed. The following are the details of the MPs:

- Cycle/Unit = 5 days

- Offset = 0 day

- Shift Factor for Late Completion = 100%, Tolerance (+) = 0%

- Shift Factor for Early Completion = 100%, Tolerance (-) = 0%

- Cycle Modification Factor = 1.00

- Call Horizon = 5 days

- Scheduling Period = 365 days

- Completion Requirement = CHECKED

- Scheduling Indicator = Time

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Plan with Completion Indicator CHECKED ge...
entry.content:
Hi @indraniljoshi1989,

Notice that you've activated enhancing call horizon functionality (switch -  EAM_SFWS_MPLAN_OPEN_HORIZ_DAYS) which allows you to set call horizon in days. This may be the cause for some plans bypassing the completion requirement check. 

Check this SAP note and implement the corrections - 1849123 - EAMCC: Enhancing the call horizon- check for call completion - SAP for Me

Regards,
Ritesh PR

entry.title: BAPI to change work center in mass
entry.content:
Hi All, 

Greetings !

I need to develop a program for mass change of work center & their capacity . Can any one please let me know any BAPI / FM available for it ?

Thanking you 

Mohammed

entry.title: Inspections characteristics are not supported for Equipment, General Maintenance & FL objects
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I recently observed that Insp. characteristics structure or feature is not supported in the S/4HANA Migration Cockpit On-Premise 2022 FPS02. 

Could you please let me know the reason for not providing this structure in the underlying API's for the mentioned PM Migration objects.

Also, I request you to suggest either a alternative method to upload this structure data into the SAP or share the FMs/BAPIs that will help to create/change the task list data.

Looking forward to hear more information from your side.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

Thanks,

Vishwa

entry.title: Resource scheduling custom report
entry.content:
Hi 
Business wants to have custom report for resource scheduling like processing status, attainment percentage, schedule status, etc.

Please let me know any Table or BAPI for same to create custom report.

entry.title: Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planner App
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Can you please let us know regarding Resource Scheduling for Maintenance Planner App and in detail about all the integrations that needs to be done for this app.

Regards,

Preethi.

entry.title: BAPI to change maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hi All , 

Tried to use BDC, LSMW to change task list en masse but was not successful . Can any one please suggest any BAPI or other available features on S4 hana cloud to change task list ( equipment task list, general task list ) in mass  .  

Thanking you .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: MIC Results not displayed or recorded in IW32 Order Checklists List of results Insp. Characteristic
entry.content:
Hello,

After genetaring a checklists in a order (release + save).  We try to enter the result in the Checklists tab / List of results.  When choosing a catalog code in Result colunm of a Inspection characteristic in editing mode, the code and its definition appear correctly.  When I save, the results disappear even though the message "Saved Sucessfully." Message No. EAM_IDMS204
In table QAME the entries of the inspection lot are there but I don't see the result.  And there is no entries in QASR.  

 When Using QE02 to enter a result, after saving we still see the result in Change Results: Characteristic Overview but not in List of results of order (IW32) Checklists tab.

In IW32, BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS is called but not in QE02.

Is there a way to make the result appear in this ALV ?

Thank you

entry.title: Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited (The recipients are determined automatically.)
entry.content:
Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited.

Previously I could edit the recipients of a workflow, but now I get the message “The recipients are determined automatically.”, and it does not allow to edit the recipients.
What can I do to make the recipients editable?

entry.title: How to update Object list of Maintenance Item by BAPI/Function Module
entry.content: I am not able to find any BAPI/Function module to update Object List of Maintenance Item.

entry.title: Partner function in equipment.
entry.content:
In SAP Public cloud, we have configured new partner function (Install At), the same getting determined in customer master and sales order. While creating delivery and doing PGI, we link serial number to the material (Extras - Serial Numbers - assign the respective serial number).
Need help with the requirement is to have this partner function populated in the partner function for the equipment and should be visible in IE03.

entry.title: Functional location Enhanced search Help
entry.content: Functional location Enhanced search Help is not working, whereas for Equipment it is working

entry.title: SAP EAM Aktivierung in SAP ECC (nicht S/4HANA)
entry.content: Ist das korrekt?: Die Grundfunktionen von SAP EAM sind in ECC (nicht S/4HANA) bereits enthalten und erfordern keine separate Lizenzierung. Die Aktivierung erfolgt über Customizing-Einstellungen im SAP-System. Hierbei können bestehende PM-Funktionen um EAM-spezifische Funktionen erweitert werden.

entry.title: Activation of SAP EAM in SAP ECC (not S/4HANA)
entry.content: Is it correct?: The core functions of SAP EAM are already included in ECC (not S/4HANA) and do not require separate licensing. Activation is done through customizing settings in the SAP ECC system.

entry.title: SAP Plant maintenance Guide
entry.content:
Hello!

Can somebody help me to get SAP Plant Maintenance Guide?

Regards.

entry.title: GRC PC:Risks and Controls SAP PP, SAP PM
entry.content:
Dear All,

I request for Risks and Controls of SAP PP and PM modules for configuration of the same in GRC PC.

i have already been through the sap notes. But they do not specify about these .odules

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: Structure list for equipment in PM Order with several equipments
entry.content:
Hello,

In my maintenance order I have several operations that each have a different equipment. When I want to call up the structure list (via the button 'List') in the components tab, it always shows the structure list of the equipment in the header instead of the equipment in the specific operation. Is there a way to get the structure list of the equipment in the operation?

entry.title: How to enable print forms in "Find maintenance orders" F2175?
entry.content:
We're currently transitioning from "Manage notification list" to "Find maintenance orders".
Are we able to enable the shop papers we were using before in this new app?

Documents are pointing to "Work packs" but we would like to print orders as done previously, using shop papers.

entry.title: How to setup work packs in "find maintenance order" F2175?
entry.content:
We're doing the setup of work packs in "Find maintenance order" app and experiencing some issues:

1. Output pack are created but no output status is shown in "Manage work packs" app; it looks like it's not processed

2. It looks like there are some standard output reports that can be printed, but how can we add the reports we're already using as shop papers? E.g. output types I see in SPRO: BREAKDOWN_REPORT; Activity_REPORT;...

entry.title: "Manage work packs" output status is blank
entry.content:
By printing on "Find maintenance order" app, work packs are created but nothing is printed.

When checking "Manage work packs" these are there but output status is blank, so it looks like these not being processed.
